subcodes.first_line: O wayfarer in the path of the Lord Most Glorious, thy face is white in the Court of Oneness, and thy service is acceptable in the Presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای برید سبیل رب مجید رویت در درگاه احدیت سفید است و خدمتت مقبول در حضرت
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @firmness in the Covenant
